summaryAm: ያለንን መውደድ እና በሌላ ነገር አለመስማማት የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ያለንን ማወቅ እና ማመስገን ጥሩ ነው።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የውሻው እና የጥላው ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Dog and His Reflection story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly dog walks near calm water with a small treat.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ጥላን ማየትን እና መምረጥን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the reflection and choice moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog sees its reflection in a peaceful stream.

pages.textEn: The story will end with gratitude and learning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The dog walks home peacefully after learning about contentment.
